🛡 Marketplace Engine Floor Alignment

.claude-plugin/marketplace.json advertised a CC floor 35 patch-versions below the governed minimum. This 1-line fix aligns it.


  
Governed source of truth: src/hooks/src/lib/cc-version-matrix.ts → MIN_CC_VERSION = '2.1.148'. The engine field is hand-maintained (not stamp-generated) and pinned by no test — main was green with the mismatch, which is exactly how it drifted.


  
✅ Verified: pre-commit JSON+counts+lint passed · npm run build left engine intact at >=2.1.148 · 0 plugins/ drift.

  
The 31 commands description token is intentionally stamp-maintained (scripts/stamp-counts.sh) and left as-is.
